Get objective values from a solution set

Source: R/get_solution.R
get_objectives.Rd

Extract objective values from a solutionset-class object returned by solve.

Objective values are read from run-table columns named value_<objective>, where <objective> is the objective alias.

Usage

get_objectives(x, format = c("long", "wide"), feasible_only = FALSE)

Arguments

x

A solutionset-class object returned by solve.

format

Character. Either "long" or "wide".

feasible_only

Logical. If TRUE, use only feasible runs.

Value

If format = "long", a data.frame with columns run_id, solution_id, objective, and value.

If format = "wide", a data.frame with one row per run, columns run_id and solution_id, and one column per objective.

On this page
